overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt exploring a dimly lit rustic interior with wooden furniture and candles, then opening a door to reveal a bright Mediterranean-style fantasy village with terracotta roofs overlooking a lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit rustic kitchen with wooden furniture and candlelight

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the interior room, examining wooden furniture, candles, and various objects on tables and shelves

entered.detail: dark wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof structure
flickering candles providing warm orange illumination
rustic wooden dining table with plates and food items
small window with blue and green stained glass panes
stack of chopped firewood against the wall
wooden door leading to the exterior

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit, enclosed rustic room with wooden walls and ceiling beams. Warm candlelight illuminates a central wooden table and various household items, while stacks of firewood and wooden crates fill the corners. The space has a cozy, medieval kitchen atmosphere with no other occupants present.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit balcony overlooking Mediterranean village transitioning to covered stone walkway

events.description: character opens wooden door, transitioning from dim candlelit interior to bright sunlit exterior balcony
character pauses briefly to look at the scenic village view, then continues walking along the stone pathway

agents.ego_description: steps out onto the balcony, pausing to admire the panoramic view of the terracotta-roofed village and lake, then proceeds along the covered stone walkway

entered.detail: stone balustrade with potted red flowers lining the edge
cluster of colorful stone buildings with orange terracotta roofs cascading down the hillside
expansive view of a blue lake surrounded by distant mountains under bright sky
arched stone passageway leading deeper into the village
rough stone wall of the covered exterior walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark interior, the scene explodes into bright sunlight revealing a stunning Mediterranean-style village with terracotta roofs overlooking a mountain lake. The character walks along a stone balcony lined with red flowers, passes through an archway, and continues into a covered stone corridor with the vibrant blue sky visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, enclosed rustic interior into the brilliant sunlight of a Mediterranean-style fantasy village. It begins within a cozy medieval room, moving past wooden beams and a central table illuminated by warm candlelight and surrounded by stacks of firewood. As the character moves forward, the dark interior gives way to an explosion of bright light, revealing a stunning vista of terracotta roofs overlooking a mountain lake. The scene then expands as the camera walks along a stone balcony lined with red flowers and passes through an archway, finally transitioning into a covered stone corridor under a vibrant blue sky.
